name: Golden Brown Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C and H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
3/4 cup C and H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumb Mixture: Combine sugar and flour. Cut in butter until mixture is crumbly. Stir in nuts. Set aside.
2. Cake: Cream together sugar, butter and eggs. Combine remaining flour, baking powder, salt, and buttermilk alternately with flour mixture. Stir in vanilla. Batter will be thick.
3. Spoon half the batter into a well-greased 12-cup bundt pan, sprinkle with half the crumb mixture. Add remaining batter and top with remaining crumb mixture.
4. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 1 hour. Cool for 5 minutes.
5. Invert on cake plate. Cool. (May be served warm, but not hot.)
